positive: Stylized, high-contrast celestial flora pattern, featuring bioluminescent exotic jungle plants, abstract cosmic patterns, and stylized deep-sea bioluminescent organisms. The composition must be symmetrical and suitable for a repeating apparel pattern, with strong black silhouette outlines against vibrant gradients of emerald, sapphire, and amethyst. Use highly detailed, geometric linework and clean, crisp edges. Overhead, symmetrical view, volumetric lighting, deep saturation, art deco influence, suitable for screen printing.
